notes:
Game starts but i'am getting cicked.
I've done this:
1. Install protontricks from https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks#pipx-recommended 2. Use "protontricks 813820 dotnet40" command to install .NET 4.0; 3. Run SMITE from Steam; 4. If game dosn't start, then replace the EAC dlls in Realm Royal with the ones from Paladins. The dlls for Realm Royal that need replaced are located in /Realm Royale/Binaries/EasyAntiCheat and /Realm Royale/Binaries/Win64/EasyAntiCheat The dlls that you use from Palidans are called (EasyAntiCheat_x64.dll & EasyAntiCheat_x86.dll) located in Paladins/Bianaries/EasyAntiCheat
And also tried it with VPN, but it says connection interrupted by anticeheat. :(
